component.description: Module for scheduling patient appointments and managing providers schedule

component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description: Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: commons-io
component.description: Commons-IO contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators and endian classes.

component.name: velocity
component.description: Apache Velocity is a general purpose template engine.

component.name: commons-lang
component.description: Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: antlr-runtime
component.description: A framework for constructing recognizers, compilers, and translators from grammatical descriptions containing Java, C#, C++, or Python actions.

component.name: stringtemplate
component.description:
StringTemplate is a java template engine for generating source code, web pages, emails, or any other formatted text output.
StringTemplate is particularly good at multi-targeted code generators, multiple site skins, and internationalization/localization.
It evolved over years of effort developing jGuru.com.
StringTemplate also generates the stringtemplate website: http://www.stringtemplate.org and powers the ANTLR v3 code generator. Its distinguishing characteristic is that unlike other engines, it strictly enforces model-view separation.
Strict separation makes websites and code generators more flexible and maintainable; it also provides an excellent defense against malicious template authors.
There are currently about 600 StringTemplate source downloads a month.

component.name: antlr
component.description: A framework for constructing recognizers, compilers, and translators from grammatical descriptions containing Java, C#, C++, or Python actions.

component.name: asm-commons
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-tree
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-util
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: cglib-nodep
component.description: Code generation library with shaded ASM dependecies

component.name: stax
component.description: StAX is the reference implementation of the StAX API

component.name: stax-api
component.description: StAX API is the standard java XML processing API defined by JSR-173

component.name: javassist
component.description: Javassist (JAVA programming ASSISTant) makes Java bytecode manipulation simple. It is a class library for editing bytecodes in Java.

component.name: hibernate-commons-annotations
component.description: Common reflection code used in support of annotation processing

component.name: hibernate-jpa-2.0-api
component.description: Hibernate definition of the Java Persistence 2.0 (JSR 317) API.

component.name: jta
component.description: The javax.transaction package. It is appropriate for inclusion in a classpath, and may be added to a Java 2 installation.

component.name: hibernate-c3p0
component.description: C3P0-based implementation of the Hibernate ConnectionProvder contract

component.name: hibernate-ehcache
component.description: Integration of Hibernate with Ehcache

component.name: dom4j
component.description: dom4j: the flexible XML framework for Java

component.name: c3p0
component.description: c3p0 is an easy-to-use library for augmenting traditional (DriverManager-based) JDBC drivers with JNDI-bindable DataSources, including DataSources that implement Connection and Statement Pooling, as described by the jdbc3 spec and jdbc2 std extension.

component.name: ehcache-core
component.description: This is the ehcache core module. Pair it with other modules for added functionality.

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: jcl-over-slf4j
component.description: JCL 1.1.1 implementation over SLF4J

component.name: slf4j-log4j12
component.description: The slf4j log4j-12 binding

component.name: xstream
component.description: The Codehaus is a collaborative environment for building open source projects with a strong emphasis on modern languages, focussed on quality components that meet real world needs.

component.name: xpp3_min
component.description: MXP1 is a stable XmlPull parsing engine that is based on ideas from XPP and in particular XPP2 but completely revised and rewritten to take the best advantage of latest JIT JVMs such as Hotspot in JDK 1.4+.

license.name: Indiana University Extreme! Lab Software License, vesion 1.1.1

component.name: mail
component.description: The JavaMail API provides a platform-independent and protocol-independent framework to build mail and messaging applications.

component.name: activation
component.description: JavaBeans Activation Framework (JAF) is a standard extension to the Java platform that lets you take advantage of standard services to: determine the type of an arbitrary piece of data; encapsulate access to it; discover the operations available on it; and instantiate the appropriate bean to perform the operation(s).

component.name: liquibase-core
component.description: Liquibase is a tool for managing and executing database changes.

component.name: xercesImpl
component.description: Xerces2 is the next generation of high performance, fully compliant XML parsers in the Apache Xerces family. This new version of Xerces introduces the Xerces Native Interface (XNI), a complete framework for building parser components and configurations that is extremely modular and easy to program.

component.name: xml-apis
component.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

component.name: validation-api
component.description: Bean Validation (JSR-303) API.

component.name: hibernate-validator
component.description: Hibernate's Bean Validation (JSR-303) reference implementation.

component.name: commons-fileupload
component.description: The FileUpload component provides a simple yet flexible means of adding support for multipart file upload functionality to servlets and web applications.

component.name: saxon
component.description: The XSLT and XQuery Processor

component.name: saxon-dom
component.description: Saxon support library for third-party object model DOM

component.name: spring-web
component.description: Spring Framework Parent

component.name: spring-webmvc
component.description: Spring Framework Parent

component.name: spring-context-support
component.description: Spring Framework Parent

component.name: spring-oxm
component.description: Spring Framework Parent

component.name: jfreechart
component.description: JFreeChart is a class library, written in Java, for generating charts. Utilising the Java2D APIs, it currently supports bar charts, pie charts, line charts, XY-plots and time series plots.

component.name: jcommon
component.description: JCommon is a free general purpose Java class library that is used in several projects at www.jfree.org, including JFreeChart and JFreeReport.

component.name: mysql-connector-java
component.description: MySQL JDBC Type 4 driver

license.name: The GNU General Public License, Version 2

component.name: postgresql
component.description: The PostgreSQL Driver JDBC4

component.name: jtds
component.description: TDS is an open source 100% pure Java (type 4) JDBC 3.0 driver for Microsoft SQL Server (6.5, 7, 2000,2005, and 2008) and Sybase (10, 11, 12, 15). jTDS is based on FreeTDS and is currently the fastest production-ready JDBC driver for SQL Server and Sybase. jTDS is 100% JDBC 3.0 compatible, supporting forward-only and scrollable/updateable ResultSets, concurrent (completely independent) Statements and implementing all the DatabaseMetaData and ResultSetMetaData methods.

component.name: jackson-core-asl
component.description: Jackson is a high-performance JSON processor (parser, generator)

component.name: jackson-mapper-asl
component.description: Data Mapper package is a high-performance data binding package built on Jackson JSON processor

component.name: velocity-tools
component.description: VelocityTools is an integrated collection of Velocity subprojects with the common goal of creating tools and infrastructure to speed and ease development of both web and non-web applications using the Velocity template engine.

component.name: commons-digester
component.description: The Digester package lets you configure an XML->Java object mapping module which triggers certain actions called rules whenever a particular pattern of nested XML elements is recognized.

component.name: commons-chain
component.description: An implmentation of the GoF Chain of Responsibility pattern

component.name: commons-validator
component.description: Commons Validator provides the building blocks for both client side validation and server side data validation. It may be used standalone or with a framework like Struts.

component.name: struts-core
component.description: Apache Struts

component.name: struts-taglib
component.description: Apache Struts

component.name: struts-tiles
component.description: Apache Struts

component.name: poi
component.description: Apache POI - Java API To Access Microsoft Format Files

component.name: commons-codec
component.description: The codec package contains simple encoder and decoders for various formats such as Base64 and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

component.name: quartz
component.description: Quartz is a full-featured, open source job scheduling system that can be integrated with, or used along side virtually any J2EE or J2SE application

component.name: handlebars
component.description: Logic-less and semantic templates with Java

component.name: antlr4-runtime
component.description: The ANTLR 4 Runtime

component.name: rhino
component.description: Rhino is an open-source implementation of JavaScript written entirely in Java. It is typically embedded into Java applications to provide scripting to end users.

component.name: poi-ooxml
component.description: Apache POI - Java API To Access Microsoft Format Files

component.name: poi-ooxml-schemas
component.description: Apache POI - Java API To Access Microsoft Format Files

component.name: xmlbeans
component.description: XmlBeans main jar

component.name: joda-time
component.description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

component.name: appointmentscheduling-api
component.description: API project for Appointment Scheduling

component.name: appointmentscheduling-omod
component.description: OMOD project for Appointment Scheduling
